# SubnetMask.tech

An ultra-fast, client-side network utility for computing IPv4 CIDR blocks, Variable Length Subnet Masks (VLSM), and hardware OUI mappings.

## Core Tooling Routes
- [/] Free IPv4 CIDR Subnet Calculator & Network Mask Tool
- [/vlsm] Variable Length Subnet Masking Allocation Suite
- [/oui] MAC Address OUI Lookup Engine
- [/widget] Embeddable Calculator Sandbox Configuration Panel
- [/guide] Interactive Subnetting and Subnetwork Tutorial Docs
